name: travel-agent-coordinator
description: Multi-agent travel planner built on Google's A2A Protocol — coordinator dispatches to independent AI agents via JSON-RPC 2.0

scripts.kill-ports: for port in 3000 3001 3002 5173; do pid=$(lsof -ti tcp:$port 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pid" ] && kill -9 $pid && echo "killed :$port"; done
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "coordinator,attractions,accommodation,web" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev" "npm run dev:attractions" "npm run dev:accommodation" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:agents: concurrently --names "coordinator,attractions,accommodation" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev" "npm run dev:attractions" "npm run dev:accommodation"
